values.content:
=You are a social media expert for a premium cannabis brand in the UK.

Product Name: {{ $('Merge Doc Text into Product').item.json.product_name }}
Description: {{ $('Merge Doc Text into Product').item.json.product_description }}
Product Link: {{ $('Merge Doc Text into Product').item.json.product_url }}

Rules:
- Write ONLY ONE caption
- MUST be 255 characters or LESS (STRICT HARD LIMIT — NEVER EXCEED)
- Single line, no line breaks
- Max 2 short sentences total
- Start with a 2–4 word punchy hook
- Tone: premium, clean, exciting
- Keep wording VERY concise (short phrases, no filler)
- Use at most 3 emoji (🌿 or 💨 or ✨)

CRITICAL:
1. After writing, COUNT the characters.
2. If it exceeds 255, SHORTEN it.
3. Repeat until it is 255 or less.
4. Do NOT output anything above 255 characters.

End EXACTLY with:
Explore more 👉 {{ $('Merge Doc Text into Product').item.json.product_url }}

parameters.prompt:
=Create a high-end cinematic short video (6–8 seconds) for a premium UK cannabis product.

Use the provided product image as the PRIMARY visual reference.

IMPORTANT:
- The video must visually match the product from the image
- Maintain the same color, texture, shape, and structure
- Do NOT redesign or replace the product

Product: {{ $('Merge Captions').item.json.product_name }}

Description:
{{ $('Merge Doc Text into Product').item.json.product_description }}

Visual Style:
- Luxury UK dispensary aesthetic
- Dark green, black, and gold palette
- Premium, minimal, editorial look
- Clean, high-end product focus

Scene Direction:
- Cinematic zoom-in on the product
- Slow pan with subtle micro rotation
- Macro close-up highlighting texture and trichomes
- Very subtle smoke effects
- No clutter or extra objects

Lighting:
- Moody studio lighting
- Soft highlights with cinematic shadows

Mood & Tone:
- Premium, exclusive, calm
- Luxury lifestyle feel

Text Overlay:
1. Main: "{{ $('Merge Captions').item.json.product_name }}"
2. Description highlights (3–5 lines, 2–4 words each, sequential)
3. Keep text perfectly readable, clean sans-serif only

Output:
- Aspect ratio: 9:16
- Duration: 6–8 seconds
- Cinematic motion
- High-end rendering

Strict Constraints:
- Do NOT change the product appearance
- Do NOT add unrelated objects
- Maintain exact visual consistency with the input image

parameters.subject: =❌ TheBitz420 Post FAILED – {{ $json.product_name }} (Index {{ $json.next_index }})
